caption: A person with long dark hair tied back and glasses is performing music in front of a tan, slatted wall. They are wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black vest adorned with red and white embroidery on the front. The performer stands behind a microphone on a black stand, playing an acoustic guitar. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on a small black rectangular badge located to the right of the performer. Throughout the sequence, the performer remains in a stationary position, focused on their instrument and singing into the microphone. The only significant motion is the movement of the performer's right hand strumming the guitar strings, transitioning from a higher position to a lower stroke across the frames.
